creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
Three core GNOME ports:
	print/gnomeprint	0.9    -> 0.10
	deskutils/gnomepim	1.0.50 -> 1.0.55
	math/gnumeric		0.38   -> 0.41

and these three GNOME-related ports (I am maintainer for these)
	graphics/gdk-pixbuf	0.2    -> 0.3 
	graphics/eog		0.1    -> 0.2
	devel/bonobo		update gdk-pixbuf shlib version

Fix: 

Tarball at http://www.lovett.com/FreeBSD/gnome-update-19991026.tar.gz
